message:
fix(rchd): use add_worker_state to preserve speed_score in tests

The test_worker_selector_fastest_strategy test was using
pool.add_worker(worker.config) which extracts only the WorkerConfig,
losing the speed_score value set by make_worker(). This caused the test
to fail because both workers ended up with the same default speed_score,
making the selection fall back to priority instead of speed.

Fix by using add_worker_state() which preserves the complete WorkerState
including the speed_score field.

Closes: remote_compilation_helper-qfgx

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
